title: My
subtitle: A full-stack AI/ML competency — from research and model development through to production deployment and monitoring.

categories.title: LLMs & Generative AI
categories.desc: Designing and shipping LLM-powered applications from the ground up — RAG systems, tool-calling agents, and multi-agent workflows deployed and maintained in production environments.

categories.title: Machine Learning & Deep Learning
categories.desc: Building and deploying production-grade ML and DL pipelines — from classical ensembles and statistical models to deep learning architectures and time-series forecasting for enterprise clients.

categories.title: Backend & DevOps
categories.desc: Engineering high-performance REST APIs, containerised deployments, and automated ETL pipelines that reliably power AI applications in production at scale.

categories.title: Tools & Visualization
categories.desc: Transforming raw data into actionable insights through interactive dashboards, reproducible ML workflows, and scientific computing — from exploratory analysis to client-facing reporting.
